conclusion: Repair should enforce direct-action authorization at the tool/executor boundary and require auditable wrapper/gate evidence for high-impact mutation/export actions.

sources.relevance: Tool guardrails validate/block before and after tool execution.
Guardrails plus human review decide continue/pause/stop for sensitive actions.
AI agents face tool abuse, privilege escalation, data exfiltration risk.
Secondary industry interpretation: validate and authorize every high-impact tool action.
